overview: A functional medicine clinic focused on identifying and addressing the root causes of chronic health concerns through personalized treatment plans. Uses functional labs, nutritional counseling, and lifestyle modifications to promote optimal health.
highlights: Functional lab testing and advanced diagnostic workup
Unlimited practitioner access via online patient portal
targetAudience: Patients with chronic conditions (allergies, auto-immune issues, ADHD, digestive concerns) seeking integrative, root-cause diagnosis and treatment.
